# multiline-text

The **multiline-text** (long text) field type — a derived text type.

Registers ONLY its `FieldIdentity` (with `extends: textFieldType` and a string
`coerce`). It contributes no cell or filter of its own: when a surface looks up
the `multiline-text` cell/filter and misses, the `extends`-chain fallback
resolves to `text` and reuses `TextCell` / the text `FilterContribution`.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Long text field type: identity only, extends text — reuses text's cell and filter via the extends chain.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Fields.Identity` "multiline-text"
  - Uses: `fields.Fields`
- Core:
  - Uses: `fields.defineFieldIdentity`, `fields.defineFieldType`
  - Exports: Values: `multilineTextFieldType`, `multilineTextIdentity`
- Sub-plugins:
  - **`config`** — Long-text field type: config-render capability (textarea for config-v2.fields.renderer) plus the multilineTextField factory.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
